brandNote: value is the default (jit) resolution; brandValue, when present, is the 'brand' mode override. {a.b} strings are references to other tokens.

Default badge corner radius — pill shape.

XS ghost button horizontal padding — narrower than filled.
Primary button label and icon colour at rest and hover.

card.description: Vertical gap between content sections inside a card.
Inner padding on all sides of a card.

checkbox.description: Default border color of the checkbox input box (rest, unchecked). Aliases input/borderColor.
Border color of the checkbox input box in error semantic state. Aliases input/borderColorError.
Border color of the checkbox input box on hover in error state (darker red). Aliases color/errorPressed.
Border color of the checkbox input box on hover. Aliases input/borderColorHover.
Border color of the checkbox input box in warning semantic state. Aliases color/warning.
Border color of the checkbox input box on hover in warning state. Aliases color/errorPressed — replace with a warning-pressed token if added to semantic collection.
Border width of the checkbox input box and button container. Aliases input/borderWidth.
Checkbox fill colour when checked — uses brand primary.
Checkbox border when checked.
Fill color of the checkbox input box when checked and disabled. Aliases color/contentDisabledStrong.
Checkbox fill on hover when checked.
Checkbox container background when checked.
Border radius of the checkbox button container (outer row). Aliases input/size/md/radius.
Horizontal click-target padding around the checkbox.
Default background of the checkbox button container (unchecked). Aliases input/containerColor.
Background of the checkbox button container when disabled. Aliases input/containerColorDisabled.
Background of the checkbox button container on hover (unchecked). Aliases input/containerColorFilled.
Focus ring color around the checkbox input box in error semantic state. Aliases color/status/error/border.
Vertical click-target padding around the checkbox.
Horizontal click-target padding around the checkbox.
Vertical click-target padding around the checkbox.
Minimum height (48px) of the Lg checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/lg/height.
Minimum height (40px) of the Md checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/md/height.
Minimum height (32px) of the Sm checkbox button container. Ensures single-line height while allowing growth for a second label line. Aliases input/size/sm/height.
Checkbox colour in warning / invalid hover state.

chip.description: Outlined chip background at rest — transparent.
Chip corner radius — pill shape by default.

input.description: Input border when focused — should contrast strongly with the surface.
Floating or static label text colour.
Input background when it has a value (filled variant).
Helper / hint text below the input.
Placeholder text colour before the user types.

radio.description: Default border color of the radio circle (unchecked default, focus unchecked).
Border color when radio is checked AND focused. Slightly stronger to signal active + focused state.
Stroke width of the radio circle border.
Background fill of the radio circle. Neutral surface — consistent with other input components.
Fill of the inner dot in error state. Matches error border for visual consistency.
Fill of the inner dot when radio is checked. Uses brand primary — adapts per brand theme via semantic layer.

select.description: Default and focus border color. Aliases input/borderColor → color/outline.
Border color in disabled state. Aliases input/borderColorDisabled → color/outlineVariant.
Border color in error state. Aliases input/borderColorError → color/error.
Corner radius of the container. Aliases semantic radius/sm (4px). Brands can override via radius/sm.
Stroke width of the container border. Aliases input/borderWidth → borderWidth/sm.
Color of the floating label and prepend text. Aliases color/text/secondary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.
Background fill of the select/combobox container. Aliases input/containerColor → color/surface (white).
Color of the chevron icon. Aliases color/icon/secondary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.
Fixed size of the trailing chevron icon (16px). Aliases global spacing/16.
Right padding (all sizes, 8px) — kept narrow to accommodate the chevron icon. Aliases global spacing/8.
Gap between elements in the content row for Large size (12px). Aliases global spacing/12.
Minimum height for Large size (40px). Aliases input/size/md/height. Grows to accommodate 2-line content.
Left padding for Large size (16px). Aliases global spacing/16.
Vertical padding for Large (9.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 40px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.
Gap between elements in the content row for Medium size (8px). Aliases global spacing/8.
Minimum height for Medium size (36px). Aliases global spacing/36. Add a semantic component height token if brand variation is needed.
Left padding for Medium size (12px). Aliases global spacing/12.
Vertical padding for Medium (7.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 36px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.
Gap between elements in the content row for Small size (6px). Aliases global spacing/6.
Minimum height for Small size (32px). Aliases input/size/sm/height. Grows to accommodate 2-line content.
Left padding for Small size (8px). Aliases global spacing/8.
Vertical padding for Small (5.5px each side). Derived from: (minHeight 32px − single-line content 21px) / 2. Update if minHeight changes.
Color of the selected value text. Aliases color/text/primary. Brand-aware via semantic layer.

tooltip.description: Maximum tooltip width in pixels before text wraps.

semantic.description: Heavy 4px border — strong emphasis strokes, thick separators.
Emphasis 2px border — avatar ring, focus ring width.
No border — 0px stroke. Resets borders on interactive elements.
Standard 1px border — inputs, cards, alerts, chips.
Primary data series colour — first dataset in charts and graphs.
Secondary data series colour — second dataset in charts and graphs.
Default surface — card and panel backgrounds, modal fill, input background at rest.
Standard border — input outline at rest, card border.
Focus ring — keyboard-navigation focus indicator on any interactive element. Should be highly visible.
Standard visible border — input border at rest, secondary button border, card outline.
Form control border when focused — strongest contrast to signal active state.
Form control border on pointer hover — darkens to signal interactivity.
Border on dark/inverse surfaces — outline inside tooltips or dark cards.
Prominent border — focused input, hovered input, active dropdown.
Hairline dividers — section separators, list item rule lines.
Disabled text and icon on light surfaces — secondary, ghost and outlined disabled labels.
Disabled text/icon on coloured or branded backgrounds — primary and tonal button disabled labels.
Disabled text and icon on coloured backgrounds — primary and tonal button disabled labels.
Primary body text — headings, field labels, high-emphasis content.
Hyperlink colour at rest.
Hyperlink colour when clicked.
Hyperlink colour on hover.
Hyperlink colour after visiting.
Text on brand-coloured surfaces — labels inside branded chips, banners or highlighted rows.
Input placeholder — hint text shown before the user types.
Primary body text — headings, field labels, high-emphasis content.
Secondary text — supporting descriptions, metadata, subheadings.
Tertiary text — timestamps, captions, low-priority hint text.
Error fill — destructive button background, inline validation error indicator.
Dark error fill for pressed state — destructive primary pressed.
Disabled text and icon for destructive variants — on error-tinted disabled surfaces.
Text and icons ON error fill — destructive button label and icon.
Error surface — destructive button hover background.
Text and icons ON errorContainer — error message body text.
Primary content on surface — body text, default icon fill.
Icon in the brand colour — use for brand-specific icons or active-state indicators.
High-emphasis icon — default fill alongside primary body text.
Medium-emphasis icon — supporting and trailing indicator icons.
Dark surface on light theme — tooltips, snackbars, inverse cards.
Text on dark or inverse surfaces — labels inside tooltips or snackbars.
Amber label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Amber label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Amber label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Amber label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Amber label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Blue label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Blue label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Blue label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Blue label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Blue label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Brand label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Brand label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Brand label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Brand label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Brand label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Green label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Green label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Green label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Green label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Green label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Orange label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Orange label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Orange label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Orange label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Orange label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Purple label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Purple label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Purple label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Purple label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Purple label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Red label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Red label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Red label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Red label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Red label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Slate label — Mid-tone fill — badge icon or accent dot.
Slate label — Light tinted border — badge and tag border.
Slate label — Text or icon directly on a filled badge background.
Slate label — Dark tinted text — badge label text.
Slate label — Very light tinted background — badge and tag background.
Alternate quiet surface — disabled input background, disabled button container.
Secondary content on surfaceVariant — helper text, input placeholder (use color/text/placeholder instead where available).
Transparent fill — ghost buttons and outlined chips with no background. Becomes visible on hover.
Scrim overlay that covers content behind a modal or drawer.
Brand fill — primary buttons, FAB, active nav indicators, progress bars. Changes per brand mode.
Primary fill when pressed or active — pressed primary button, active tab.
Text and icons placed ON the primary fill. Must achieve 4.5:1 contrast with color/primary.
Primary fill on pointer hover — hover state for primary buttons.
Low-emphasis brand surface — tonal buttons, selected chips, brand-tinted cards.
PrimaryContainer when pressed — tonal button and chip active background.
Text and icons ON primaryContainer — tonal button labels, chip labels.
PrimaryContainer on hover — tonal button and chip hover background.
Supporting action color — secondary button border and label, outlined variants.
SecondaryContainer when pressed — filter chip active background.
Text and icons ON secondary fill.
Surface hover — table row hover, list item hover, ghost button hover.
Supporting action color — secondary button border and label, outlined variants.
Error alert / banner background.
Error alert border.
Error alert body text.
Error alert icon fill.
Info alert / banner background.
Info alert border.
Info alert body text.
Info alert icon fill.
Neutral alert / banner background.
Neutral alert border.
Neutral alert body text.
Neutral alert icon fill.
Success alert / banner background.
Success alert border.
Success alert body text.
Success alert icon fill.
Warning alert / banner background.
Warning alert border.
Warning alert body text.
Warning alert icon fill.
Page-level canvas background — sits behind all cards and panels.
Text and icons ON secondaryContainer — filter chip labels, pill text.
2× extra-large rounding. Both brands: 16px.
Maximum decorative rounding. Both brands: 24px.
Pill shape — badges, chips, avatars, toggle switches. Both brands: 9999px.
Large rounding — md/lg buttons, cards, alerts, standard inputs. JIT 8px / Brand 2px.
Standard rounding — xs/sm buttons, tooltips, small inputs. JIT 6px / Brand 0px.
No rounding — completely square corners. Both brands: 0px.
Slight rounding — small chips, inner elements. JIT 4px / Brand 0px.
Extra-large rounding — popovers, modals. Both brands: 12px.
Minimal rounding — small tags, square badges. JIT 2px / Brand 0px.
Elevation for form controls (e.g. checkbox). Both brands: shadow.sm.
Elevation for floating transient content (menus, popovers, toasts). Both brands: shadow.md.
Elevation for blocking modal surfaces (dialogs, drawers). Both brands: shadow.lg.
2× extra-large padding — maximum component inner spacing. JIT 32px / Brand 28px.
Inner gap, xs ghost button padding
Avatar 2xl height
Minimum component height — small dot badges, icons. JIT 20px / Brand 16px.
LG component height — md button, md input. JIT 40px / Brand 32px.
MD component height — sm button, md chip, sm input. JIT 32px / Brand 28px.
SM component height — xs button, lg badge. JIT 28px / Brand 24px.
XL component height — lg button, lg input. JIT 48px / Brand 40px.
XS component height — xs avatar, compact badge. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.
Large padding — lg button horizontal padding, card gap, alert padding. JIT 16px / Brand 12px.
Medium padding — md/lg button padding, chip padding, tooltip horizontal padding. JIT 12px / Brand 10px.
Small padding — sm/md button padding, input padding, badge and tooltip padding. JIT 8px / Brand 6px.
Extra-large padding — card padding. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.
Extra-small padding — xs/sm button vertical padding, badge padding. JIT 4px / Brand 3px.
Maximum layout spacing — full-page sections. JIT 96px / Brand 80px.
Large layout spacing — page section gaps, sidebar gutters. JIT 48px / Brand 32px.
Default layout spacing — standard section padding. JIT 32px / Brand 24px.
Small layout spacing — compact section padding. JIT 24px / Brand 20px.
Extra-large layout spacing — page hero padding. JIT 64px / Brand 48px.
Minimum layout gap — tight section padding, small gutters. JIT 16px / Brand 12px.
